utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each is fully specified with coverage details and costs: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health with coverage descriptions and monthly costs; property_coverage includes coverage details and costs; travel_coverage includes coverage and costs; additional_services include several services with their respective costs; total_budget includes monthly and annual totals with currency. Therefore, all 5 of 5 items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists all policies under the provider 'LifeFirst'. For health coverage, both physical and mental health are described with coverage details and monthly costs matching 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' options in the ground truth. For property coverage, 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' matches the given description and cost (€60/month). For travel coverage, the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' at €50/month matches the ground-truth listing under travel insurance. The additional services include gym membership reimbursement (€300/month), travel assistance service (€150/month), and premium membership (€20/month). In the ground truth, 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' has a rating of 6 under health_enhancement_services, '24/7 Travel Assistance' (which corresponds to the travel assistance service) has a rating of 10 under travel_enhancement_services, and 'Premium Insurance Membership' (matching the premium membership) has a rating of 10 under general_services.
